name: Application Control
description: The practice of permitting only authorised applications to run, preventing the execution of malicious software.

name: Patch Applications
description: Regularly applying security patches to software to address vulnerabilities and protect against known exploits.

name: Configure Microsoft Office Macro Settings
description: Adjusting settings to limit the execution of macros, reducing the risk of macro-based malware.

name: User Application Hardening
description: Implementing secure configurations for web browsers, PDF viewers, and other common applications to mitigate potential attack vectors.

name: Restrict Administrative Privileges
description: Limiting the number of users with administrative privileges to minimise the impact of credential theft.

name: Patch Operating Systems
description: Regularly updating and patching operating systems to address security vulnerabilities.

name: Multi-Factor Authentication
description: Enforcing multi-factor authentication identity verification and thwarting unauthorised access.

name: Regular Backups
description: Regularly backing up critical data to ensure data integrity and enable recovery in case of data loss.
